center.name: Budongo Forest
center.summary: Budongo Forest是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联2种鸟类，包括非洲八色鸫、Ituri batis，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The Ituri batis occurs in the eastern Congo Basin in Ituri and Itombwe in the north eastern Democratic Republic of Congo where it is uncommon and in the Budongo Forest in western Uganda where it is common. The Ituri batis is found in lowland forest, between

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: longipennis spends the austral winter in the western Ugandan forests as far north as Budongo, and coastal Kenya as far north as Gedi ruins. A bird found at Minziro Forest in northwestern Tanzania was in heavy moult, suggestive that the area is on the southeastern fringe of the non-breeding range. They arrive in southern Africa from late October, though mainly in November and early December. They seldom breed north of the Rukwa Valley and Rufiji River in Tanzania, and no further south than central Mozambique

They seldom breed north of the Rukwa Valley and Rufiji River in Tanzania, and no further south than central Mozambique
